documentation.description: See usage in GNAT.Formatted_String source file g-forstr.ads
List of possible alignment of integer values
Range of possible numerical base on integer values

subprograms.code: function "&" (Left : Formatted_UXString; Right : Boolean) return Formatted_UXString

documentation.description: Return the formatted form of the Boolean item matching %s

subprograms.code: function "&" (Left : Formatted_UXString; Right : Character) return Formatted_UXString

documentation.description: Return the formatted form of the Character item matching %c

subprograms.code: function "&" (Left : Formatted_UXString; Right : Duration) return Formatted_UXString

documentation.description: Return the formatted form of the Duration item matching %f, %e, %F, %E, %g, %G

subprograms.code: function "&" (Left : Formatted_UXString; Right : Float) return Formatted_UXString

documentation.description: Return the formatted form of the Float item matching %f, %e, %F, %E, %g, %G

subprograms.code: function "&" (Left : Formatted_UXString; Right : Integer) return Formatted_UXString

documentation.description: Return the formatted form of the Integer item matching %d, %o, %x, %X

subprograms.code: function "&" (Left : Formatted_UXString; Right : System.Address) return Formatted_UXString

documentation.description: Return the formatted form of the UXString item matching %s
documentation.returns: Return the formatted form of the Address item matching %p

subprograms.code: function "&" (Left : Formatted_UXString; Right : UXString) return Formatted_UXString

documentation.description: Return the formatted form of the UXString item matching %s
Create the formatted string with Spec format

subprograms.name: Formatted_Fixed_Point

documentation.description: Return the formatted form of the generic fixed point item matching %f, %e, %F, %E, %g, %G

subprograms.name: Formatted_Floating

documentation.description: Return the formatted form of the generic floating item matching %f, %e, %F, %E, %g, %G

subprograms.name: Formatted_Integer

documentation.description: Return the formatted form of the generic number item matching %d, %o, %x, %X

subprograms.name: Formatted_Scalar

documentation.description: Return the formatted form of the scalar item matching %c or %s
Return the formatted string with the respect of given parameters

subprograms.name: Integer_Format

documentation.description:
Return the formatted string of the integer Item with respect of specified Base, Put_Plus sign,
output Field size, alignment Justify, padding Fill
